title: PACIFIC PSYCHOLOGY CLINIC - 211info
text: PACIFIC PSYCHOLOGY CLINIC PORTLAND PACIFIC PSYCHOLOGY CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health services to the community, including individual, couples, family, child, and group therapy, psychological and cognitive assessments, consultation services, speech-language services, and psycho-educational services. 1411 SW Morrison Street Suite 310 Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Call for information Hours: In person: Monday-Thursday 9am-6pm, Friday 9am-5pm Telehealth: Monday-Thursday 9am-8pm, Friday 9am-5pm (503) 352-2400 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 352-2400 Intake (971) 266-2955 FAX Intake (503) 352-2400 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment. Prospective clients are interviewed by phone and then an appointment is arranged for an intake assessment. FEES: Varies by service; a sliding scale fee is available. Accepts Oregon Health Plan (OHP) for the following coordinated care organizations: Care Oregon, Health Share Oregon, Columbia Pacific, and Trillium Health. Cannot bill to private insurance plans. Speech-language services: Accepts Care Oregon and Medicare DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-8pm, Friday 9am-5pm, Saturday 9am-3pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the 3rd floor of the Morrison Plaza Building, on the northwest corner of 14th and Morrison. On the Max line. Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Child Guidance Conjoint Counseling Family Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Speech Therapy If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PACIFIC PSYCHOLOGY CLINIC PORTLAND
